title: The Rakata and the Unknown World

'''''The Rakata and the Unknown World''''' was a [[Book/Legends|book]] written by the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] sometime during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. In the book, Revan focused on the ancient [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] [[Species/Legends|species]] and their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], known then as the "[[Lehon/Legends|Unknown World]]." During the [[New Sith Wars]], nearly [[1000 BBY/Legends|three millennia later]], the book was one of the texts kept in the [[Library/Legends|archives]] of the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]]. There, the volume was extensively studied by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] student [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]].

==History==
[[File:DarthBane-frontal.jpg|thumb|left|300px|The Sith student Bane (pictured) studied ''The Rakata and the Unknown World'', having become fascinated with its author, Darth Revan.]]
The [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Revan/Legends|Darth Revan]] wrote a [[Book/Legends|book]] titled ''The Rakata and the Unknown World''<ref name="PoD" /> during the [[Jedi Civil War]], at some point between [[3959 BBY]] and [[3957 BBY]].<ref name="Release date" /> The volume focused on the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]],<ref name="PoD" /> a [[Species/Legends|species]] whose [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] had ruled [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] over [[30,000 BBY|twenty-six thousand]] [[Standard year/Legends|years]] beforehand,<ref name="JvS">[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']]</ref> and their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]],<ref name="PoD" /> which at the [[Time/Legends|time]] was known simply as the "[[Lehon/Legends|Unknown World]]."<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref> Revan's book was featured in the [[Library/Legends|archives]] of the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Burial/Legends|necropolis]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].<ref name="PoD" /> Two years into the war,<ref name="KOTOR CG">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref> Revan himself was [[Capture of Darth Revan|captured]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], and [[Light side of the Force/Legends|redeemed]].<ref name="KOTOR" />

During the [[New Sith Wars]], nearly [[1000 BBY/Legends|three thousand years]] after the Jedi Civil War's [[Battle of Rakata Prime|end]], a Sith student named [[Darth Bane/Legends|Bane]] found ''The Rakata and the Unknown World'' in the [[Sith academy|Sith Academy's]] archives and studied the book thoroughly. Bane was not as interested in the contents of the book as much as in its [[Author/Legends|author]], Darth Revan. The Sith student was curious about Revan's title of [[Darth/Legends|Darth]], which had fallen into disuse with the emergence of the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Skere Kaan]]'s [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]]. Bane eventually abandoned the Brotherhood's [[Sith training|teachings]] and assumed the Darth title. Shortly after investigating [[Darth Revan's Sith Holocron]] that he found on the Unknown World—which by that time had been renamed Lehon—Bane used Revan's [[Thought bomb|teachings]] to [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan|destroy]] Kaan's Brotherhood and instead create a [[Order of the Sith Lords|new Sith Order]], in the process [[Rule of Two/Legends|limiting]] the Sith to only two members at a time: a [[Sith Master/Legends|Master]] and an [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]].<ref name="PoD" />

==Behind the scenes==
''The Rakata and the Unknown World'' was created by author [[Drew Karpyshyn]] for the [[2006]] novel ''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]''.<ref name="PoD" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Darth Bane: Path of Destruction]]'' {{Ab|Darth Bane: Path of Destruction (audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
